text: the suit pronote debt liability. The Respondent is not having any immovable property or fixed abide residence in India. It is very much impossible to get his presence in the suit. Hence I am giving this affidavit I have got a strong prima facie case and balance of convenience lying in my favor. Hence, I pray that the honorable court may be pleased to order conditional arrest of the Respondent/Defendant before judgment, in case the respondent fails to give security, pending disposal of the main suit in the interests of justice. Otherwise I will be put to very much and irreparable loss. Filed by Be pleased to consider Advocate for Petitioner/Plaintiff Deponent. Solemnly affirmed and signed bef

text: my order on demand. I further submitted that I made several demands calling upon the Respondent/Defendant to discharge the entire suit promissory note debt together with agreed interest. But the defendant has been procrastinating the same on some pretext or other and did not pay any amount under the suit promissory note debt to me. Hence I obliged to file the instant suit against the Respondent/Defendant for recovery of the suit promissory note debt together with interest. Even though the interest is compound interest @ 18% P.A. I am claiming simple interest @18% P.A. The Respondent/Defendant is not entitled to any debt relief acts 45/87 or 2/90.
